skillChallengeSubsystem.minimumViableProduct: GM-authored challenge card with CL, complexity, success/failure targets, primary skills, DCs, effects, participant checks, chat output, and manual override controls.
skillChallengeSubsystem.preferredSlot: scripts/apps/skill-challenges/skill-challenge-app.js for UI, scripts/engine/skill-challenges/SkillChallengeEngine.js for pure state transitions, data/skill-challenges/*.json for example templates.

skillChallengeFeatPolicy.gmNote: This feat only applies inside a Galaxy of Intrigue Skill Challenge. Track it on the Skill Challenge card/app or resolve with the GM at the table.
skillChallengeFeatPolicy.reason: Galaxy of Intrigue Skill Challenges are encounter-like, party-facing progress clocks with successes, failures, complexity, effects, participation, and narrative consequences. They do not map cleanly to actor static bonuses.

findings.message: Forceful Recovery needs manual source verification before automated parity claims.

context.name: Forceful Recovery
context.notes: Appears in the Galaxy of Intrigue feat listing/index scan, but the current catalog entry is sourced to The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide. Preserve as review-only until the book/source collision is manually verified.
